title: 40 Litres Strong Robust Flexible Tubs Multi Purpose Storage Container Bucket Black Yellow or Red Coloured For Garden & Home (3, Black)
features: Our multi-purpose buckets Ideal for use in your home and garden due to its lightweight and strong durability. These flexi buckets can be used as tool bags, giant mixing tubs, water tubs, rubble removers or to collect and carry objects safely. 40 Litres tubs are really spacious and perfect for carring heavy loads.

Our flexi tubs are especially manufectured for for a wide range of home, garden, school, office or industrial uses such as storage containers, toy tubs, laundry baskets, garden waste, washing cars or mixing plaster. Features strong integrated carry handles suitable for carrying heavy loads.

These strong containers are soft-sided strong tubs which come with a special reinforced handles and large capacities, ideal for building sites, property renovations and DIY tasks in the home and garden. . Its large flexi size helps you transport materials or equipment without having to make multiple journeys.

Each 40 Litres tub has a large capacity, simply select colour and number of tubs required, we have black, yellow & red: 46cm Diameter x 32.5cm Height (37.5cm height including handles). Simply select the colour and number of buckets required from the menu above.
description: Product Description Pluto Packaging At Pluto Packaging we offer a range of packaging products, whether you're looking to move home, or secure items in transit our versatile range ensures you are fully equipped and prepared. Our products range from bubble wrap rolls, strong cardboard boxes, padded envelopes, mailing bags etc. 40 Litres Coloured Flexi Tubs Multi Purpose Storage Buckets Our flexi buckets are reliable and multi-purpose, with a huge range of applications. These flexi tubs are perfect for the workplace, they are a handy size for stowing away your tools, moving gardening supplies and for construction workThe tub's fixed handles are strong, so you can carry heavier weights of rubble & gravel. Flexible Buckets Our handy yet durable tubs are suitable for a wide range of home, garden, school, office or industrial uses such as storage containers, toy tubs, and laundry baskets, garden waste, washing cars or mixing plaster. They are really spacious and perfect for heavy loads.
